_comment: ComfyUI API-format workflow for Delta Sampling. Node IDs are stable string names so app.js can address slots by name. Matches delta_sampler.py:LatentDeltaKSampler (3 model loaders, 3 independent positive/negative conditioning pairs, delta_strength/denoise).

_meta.title: Adapted (SD1.5 base; ControlNet injected via conditioning)

inputs.text: a photo of a small house with a window

sampler._comment: Custom node from delta_sampler.py (original 400-line version). Runs 3 models in lockstep, injects delta_strength·(ε_adapted − ε_source) into ε_target each step in pixel-aligned latent space.

adapted_cnet._comment: Standard ComfyUI ControlNet wiring: ControlNetApplyAdvanced injects the control signal into BOTH the positive AND negative conditioning of the adapted leg, matching exp1_generate.py. Slot 0 = positive, slot 1 = negative.
